column3:
Upgrade your interior with the Easy Stick Blackout Apollo Iron Blind – a sleek, no-drill solution designed for quick and effortless installation. It fixes directly onto your window using a strong adhesive backing, ensuring a secure, tool-free setup.

  Crafted from high-quality blackout cellular fabric in a sophisticated iron shade, it effectively blocks out light while adding a modern, refined touch to your space. It also helps regulate indoor temperature, keeping your room cool in summer and warm in winter.

  Its slim, frameless design delivers a clean and contemporary finish, while the cordless operation provides added safety for homes with children.

  Suitable for most windows and doors (excluding sliding doors), this blind offers a perfect blend of style, comfort, and energy efficiency.

Refresh your interiors with the Easy Stick Blackout Apollo Jeans Blind – a modern, no-drill solution designed for simple and stress-free installation. It easily applies directly to your window using a durable adhesive backing, ensuring a secure hold without the need for tools.

  Made from premium blackout cellular fabric in a stylish jeans-inspired shade, it effectively blocks out light while adding a cool, contemporary feel to your space. It also helps maintain a comfortable indoor temperature by keeping rooms cooler in summer and warmer during winter.

  The slim, frameless design creates a neat and uncluttered look, while the cordless system provides a safer option for homes with children.

  Suitable for most windows and doors (excluding sliding doors), this blind delivers a perfect mix of practicality, comfort, and modern style.

Upgrade your space with the Easy Stick Blackout Apollo Cloud Blind – a sleek, no-drill solution designed for effortless installation and modern living. Simply attach it directly to your window using strong adhesive for a secure, tool-free fit.

Crafted with high-quality blackout cellular fabric, it delivers excellent light control while helping maintain a comfortable indoor temperature—keeping your room cool in summer and warm in winter. Its slim, frame-free design ensures a neat, clutter-free look, while the cordless operation makes it a safe choice for homes with children.

Perfect for most windows and doors (excluding sliding doors), this blind offers a stylish and practical way to enhance privacy, comfort, and energy efficiency.

column3:
Transform Your Space with Azalea sheer Cream Roller Blinds

Create a sophisticated and inviting atmosphere with our Azalea sheer Cream roller blinds. The elegant cream color complements a wide range of interior designs, adding a touch of warmth and style to any room.

Crafted from a durable blend of 35% polyester and 65% PVC, these blinds are designed for longevity and easy maintenance. The 3% screen fabric gently filters natural light, reducing glare and protecting your furniture from UV rays while maintaining your view.

Key Features:

  • Fabric: High-quality Screen 3% fabric for optimal light filtering.

  • Composition: A robust blend of 35% Polyester and 65% PVC ensures durability.

  • Customizable: With a wide range of sizes available, from 250mm to 2800mm in width and 250mm to 4000mm in drop, you can find the perfect fit for any window.

The Azalea sheer Cream roller blinds offer a versatile and stylish solution for your home or office.

Please note that the Insta Fit Roller may not stick as effectively to plastic.

column2: 3 Meter Silver Beaded Pull Chain Extension with Connector for Ceiling Light Fan
column3:
About This Item

  • Pull Chain Extension: 10 feet (3 meters) long silver metal beaded chain with 10 matching connectors. Ideal for replacing or extending pull chains.

  • Chain Size: Bead diameter is 4.5 mm (0.18 inch). Comes with 10 connectors for easy attachment.

  • Applications: Suitable for roller blinds, ceiling fans, ceiling lights, ventilation systems, curtain pulls, bottle cap pendants, and more.

  • Important Note: Only 4.5 mm chains are suitable for roller blinds and shutters. Do not use 3.2 mm chains for this purpose. Please check the bead diameter before purchasing.

  • Adjustable Length: Easily cut to your desired length using scissors or pliers for custom use.

Safety Warnings

  • Not suitable for children under 3 years old. Use under adult supervision only.

  • Must be used with direct adult supervision.

Usage Instructions
Cut the chain between beads with scissors or pliers to adjust to the desired length.

column2: 10 X Child Safety Blind P Clip Device Hook for Roller,Vertical,Roman Chain/Cords
column3:
10 X SAFETY CLIPS  To Fit Roller, Roman or Vertical blinds Chain/cord Easy to fit slip the cord/chain through the loop and screw to the wall or frame.

Please note

Always fit the device at the maximum distance from the control unit.

Ensure that the minimum distance from the floor to the bottom of the device is greater than 1.5m if this is not the case the

control chain must be shortened

This device is designed to keep chains in blind systems under tension.

Suitable for single chain loop

Size:

Projection from wall is 2cm

Width is 16mm

Length is 5cm (2 inch)
